summary: The active branch is vault-sync-architecture. Local config bundles now export snapshot ancestry, the Settings flow previews same-snapshot, fast-forward, divergent, legacy, and cross-vault imports before replace, and applying an import records the incoming snapshot as the new local baseline.
next_steps: Implement record-level merge semantics for hosts, keys, snippets, and known-host trust instead of atomic full-replace imports.
Run .github/workflows/release-macos.yml once with live repository secrets to verify GitHub-hosted signing, notarization, promotion, and release upload.
blockers: Vault imports still replace local state atomically and do not resolve divergent record-level conflicts.
GitHub-hosted release publishing has not yet been exercised with live repository secrets.
